ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Designs and develops parametric models for products using computer-aided design (CAD) software, ensuring precision, efficiency, and innovation.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: A Parametric Designer creates complex 3D models and designs using algorithms and mathematical equations to automate the design process. They work closely with cross-functional teams to develop and refine product designs, ensuring they meet customer needs and industry standards.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in design and technology can pursue a diploma in CAD or a related field.

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree in engineering or design can acquire the necessary skills to become a Parametric Designer.

future_builder.description: Experienced designers and engineers can transition into Parametric Design by acquiring advanced skills in algorithms, programming, and design automation.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2+ years of experience in CAD design or product development

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields can switch to Parametric Design by acquiring the necessary skills and portfolio experience.

roadmap.title: Capstone Project
topics: Design and develop a parametric model
